PowerShell($port = Get-Content .internal/editor.port; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:$port/command/build" -Method Post -TimeoutSec 180; "success: $\($r.success\)"; \($r.issues | Where-Object { $_.severity -eq 'error' } | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.resource\):$\($_.range.start.line\) $\($_.message\)" }\))

PowerShell($port = Get-Content .internal/editor.port; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:$port/command/build" -Method Post -TimeoutSec 180; "success: $\($r.success\)"; \($r.issues | Where-Object { $_.severity -eq 'error' } | ForEach-Object { "ERR  $\($_.resource\):$\($_.range.start.line\) $\($_.message\)" }\))
